subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Fadl, the matter concerning Mr. McNutt and Khan is indeed a most important question. Counsel Khan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابی الفضائل مسئله مستر مکنات و خان بسیار مسئله مهمه است جناب خان را نصیحت
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @contention and conflict, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause
